subcodes.first_line: Indeed, We have sent forth the Utterance in the form of a Tablet and dispatched it unto them that have believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد بعثنا البیان علی هیئه اللوح و ارسلناه الی الذین آمنوا بالله المهیمن القیوم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
